feed.title: Onion Message Jamming in the Lightning Network

entry.title: Onion Message Jamming in the Lightning Network
entry.summary: When considering the implementation of new algorithms to manage system resources, a simple back-pressure algorithm emerges as a preferable choice due to its lower complexity and minimal impact on honest users. This approach is favored initially to observe its effectiveness and learn from practical application before potentially deploying more complex alternatives. Having several strategies outlined provides flexibility and preparedness to adapt if the initial choice needs refinement or replacement based on real-world results and feedback. This methodical approach allows for a balanced evaluation of trade-offs between simplicity and functionality in system management.
